_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin is a potent inhibitor of glioma growth.

_contextSnippet: wild-type merlin and merlinS518A, but not merlinS518D, expression in either U87MG or U251 significantly increased the survival of the experimental mice
details: Mice injected with merlin-expressing U87MG/U251 cells showed significantly increased survival compared to control cells; mean survival of control mice was <3-4 weeks
